category_sources: source_facts.description says it gets and sets the default browser; official README identifies it as a macOS command-line tool for the default HTTP handler.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is defaultbrowser; official GitHub README title is defaultbrowser.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains install and usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe command-line default browser management on macOS using Launch Services.
